prompt: What is the chemical symbol for gold? Return only the symbol.
Who painted the Mona Lisa? Return only the artist name.
Classify the sentiment as exactly one word: positive, neutral, or negative. Text: The packaging looked premium, but the battery died after an hour and support ignored me.
Classify the sentiment as exactly one word: positive, neutral, or negative. Text: The screen is 6.1 inches and the phone ships in black.
Summarize in at most 10 words and include battery and refund: The customer reported that the battery overheated twice, requested a refund, and asked the company to stop sending replacement offers.
Summarize in at most 9 words and include cache and latency: A cache hit avoids the remote model call, preserves the final answer, and lowers latency during evaluation.
Return only minified JSON. Extract organization, city, and date from: On 14 March 2025, NovaForge opened a lab in Porto.
Return only minified JSON. Extract name, email, and phone from: Contact Lara at lara.silva@example.com or +55-11-99888-7766.
A tank holds 80 liters. It is 3/5 full, then 12 liters are added. Return only the number of liters now in the tank.
A recipe for 4 people uses 300 grams of flour. How many grams are needed for 10 people? Return only the number.
If a badge is expired, access is denied. Access is not denied. Is the badge expired? Return exactly yes or no.

Nia, Omar, and Pia each choose one color: red, green, or blue. No two choose the same color. Nia is not blue. Omar is not red. Pia is not green. If Nia is red, what color is Pia? Return only the color.

Fix this Python code so it returns True if any item is even. Return only corrected Python code: def has_even(nums):
    return nums[0] % 2 == 0

Fix this Python code so it returns the arithmetic mean as a float when needed. Return only corrected Python code: def average(nums):
    return sum(nums) // len(nums)
Write a Python function count_words(text) that returns the number of whitespace-separated words. Return only Python code.
Write a Python function last_digit(n) that returns the last decimal digit of an integer, ignoring sign. Return only Python code.
